rationale: Educ. Code §32.031 states broad education technology policy goals. It contains no fiscal mechanism, funding formula, or property tax provision that would conflict with increasing the homestead exemption amount.
quote: To prepare students for the 21st century, it is the policy of this state that a superior education should be available to all students under a thorough and efficient system of public education.
_note: No direct conflict; §32.031 is a purpose/policy statement with no operative linkage to Tax Code §11.13(b) exemption amounts.
